230→                throw DateTimeFormatException(
231→                    "Can not create a LocalDate from the given input: " +
232→                        "the day of week is ${DayOfWeek(it)} but the date is $date, which is a ${date.dayOfWeek}"
233→                )
234→            }
235→        }
236→        return date
237→    }
238→
239→    fun populateFrom(date: LocalDate) {
240→        year = date.year
241→        monthNumber = date.monthNumber
242→        dayOfMonth = date.dayOfMonth
243→        isoDayOfWeek = date.dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber
244→    }
245→
246→    override fun copy(): IncompleteLocalDate = IncompleteLocalDate(year, monthNumber, dayOfMonth, isoDayOfWeek)
247→
248→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
249→        other is IncompleteLocalDate && year == other.year && monthNumber == other.monthNumber &&
250→            dayOfMonth == other.dayOfMonth && isoDayOfWeek == other.isoDayOfWeek
251→
252→    override fun hashCode(): Int =
253→        year.hashCode() * 31 + monthNumber.hashCode() * 31 + dayOfMonth.hashCode() * 31 + isoDayOfWeek.hashCode() * 31
254→
255→    override fun toString(): String =
256→        "${year ?: "??"}-${monthNumber ?: "??"}-${dayOfMonth ?: "??"} (day of week is ${isoDayOfWeek ?: "??"})"
257→}
258→
259→private class YearDirective(private val padding: Padding, private val isYearOfEra: Boolean = false) :
260→    SignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
261→        DateFields.year,
262→        minDigits = padding.minDigits(4),
263→        maxDigits = null,
264→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(4),
265→        outputPlusOnExceededWidth = 4,
266→    ) {
267→    override val builderRepresentation: String
268→        get() = when (padding) {
269→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::year.name}()"
270→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::year.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"
271→        }.let {
272→            if (isYearOfEra) {
273→                it + YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT
274→            } else it
275→        }
276→
277→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
278→        other is YearDirective && padding == other.padding && isYearOfEra == other.isYearOfEra
279→
280→    override fun hashCode(): Int = padding.hashCode() * 31 + isYearOfEra.hashCode()
281→}
282→
283→private class ReducedYearDirective(val base: Int, private val isYearOfEra: Boolean = false) :
284→    ReducedIntFieldDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
285→        DateFields.year,
286→        digits = 2,
287→        base = base,
288→    ) {
289→    override val builderRepresentation: String
290→        get() =
291→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::yearTwoDigits.name}($base)".let {
292→                if (isYearOfEra) {
293→                    it + YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT
294→                } else it
295→            }
296→
297→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
298→        other is ReducedYearDirective && base == other.base && isYearOfEra == other.isYearOfEra
299→
300→    override fun hashCode(): Int = base.hashCode() * 31 + isYearOfEra.hashCode()
301→}
302→
303→private const val YEAR_OF_ERA_COMMENT =
304→    " /** TODO: the original format had an `y` directive, so the behavior is different on years earlier than 1 AD. See the [kotlinx.datetime.format.byUnicodePattern] documentation for details. */"
305→
306→/**
307→ * A special directive for year-of-era that behaves equivalently to [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.year].
308→ * This is the result of calling [byUnicodePattern] on a pattern that uses the ubiquitous "y" symbol.
309→ * We need a separate directive so that, when using [DateTimeFormat.formatAsKotlinBuilderDsl], we can print an
310→ * additional comment and explain that the behavior was not preserved exactly.
311→ */
312→internal fun DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.yearOfEra(padding: Padding) {
313→    @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
314→    when (this) {
315→        is AbstractWithDateBuilder -> addFormatStructureForDate(
316→            BasicFormatStructure(YearDirective(padding, isYearOfEra = true))
317→        )
318→    }
319→}
320→
321→/**
322→ * A special directive for year-of-era that behaves equivalently to [DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.year].
323→ * This is the result of calling [byUnicodePattern] on a pattern that uses the ubiquitous "y" symbol.
324→ * We need a separate directive so that, when using [DateTimeFormat.formatAsKotlinBuilderDsl], we can print an
325→ * additional comment and explain that the behavior was not preserved exactly.
326→ */
327→internal fun DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.yearOfEraTwoDigits(baseYear: Int) {
328→    @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
329→    when (this) {
330→        is AbstractWithDateBuilder -> addFormatStructureForDate(
331→            BasicFormatStructure(ReducedYearDirective(baseYear, isYearOfEra = true))
332→        )
333→    }
334→}
335→
336→private class MonthDirective(private val padding: Padding) :
337→    UnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
338→        DateFields.month,
339→        minDigits = padding.minDigits(2),
340→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(2),
341→    ) {
342→    override val builderRepresentation: String
343→        get() = when (padding) {
344→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthNumber.name}()"
345→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthNumber.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"
346→        }
347→
348→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is MonthDirective && padding == other.padding
349→    override fun hashCode(): Int = padding.hashCode()
350→}
351→
352→private class MonthNameDirective(private val names: MonthNames) :
353→    NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(DateFields.month, names.names, "monthName") {
354→    override val builderRepresentation: String
355→        get() =
356→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::monthName.name}(${names.toKotlinCode()})"
357→
358→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is MonthNameDirective && names.names == other.names.names
359→    override fun hashCode(): Int = names.names.hashCode()
360→}
361→
362→private class DayDirective(private val padding: Padding) :
363→    UnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(
364→        DateFields.dayOfMonth,
365→        minDigits = padding.minDigits(2),
366→        spacePadding = padding.spaces(2),
367→    ) {
368→    override val builderRepresentation: String
369→        get() = when (padding) {
370→            Padding.ZERO -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfMonth.name}()"
371→            else -> "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfMonth.name}(${padding.toKotlinCode()})"
372→        }
373→
374→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is DayDirective && padding == other.padding
375→    override fun hashCode(): Int = padding.hashCode()
376→}
377→
378→private class DayOfWeekDirective(private val names: DayOfWeekNames) :
379→    NamedUnsignedIntFieldFormatDirective<DateFieldContainer>(DateFields.isoDayOfWeek, names.names, "dayOfWeekName") {
380→
381→    override val builderRepresentation: String
382→        get() =
383→            "${DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate::dayOfWeek.name}(${names.toKotlinCode()})"
384→
385→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean = other is DayOfWeekDirective && names.names == other.names.names
386→    override fun hashCode(): Int = names.names.hashCode()
387→}
388→
389→internal class LocalDateFormat(override val actualFormat: CachedFormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) :
390→    AbstractDateTimeFormat<LocalDate, IncompleteLocalDate>() {
391→    override fun intermediateFromValue(value: LocalDate): IncompleteLocalDate =
392→        IncompleteLocalDate().apply { populateFrom(value) }
393→
394→    override fun valueFromIntermediate(intermediate: IncompleteLocalDate): LocalDate = intermediate.toLocalDate()
395→
396→    override val emptyIntermediate get() = emptyIncompleteLocalDate
397→
398→    companion object {
399→        fun build(block: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> {
400→            val builder = Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
401→            builder.block()
402→            return LocalDateFormat(builder.build())
403→        }
404→    }
405→
406→    internal class Builder(override val actualBuilder: AppendableFormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) :
407→        AbstractDateTimeFormatBuilder<DateFieldContainer, Builder>, AbstractWithDateBuilder {
408→
409→        override fun addFormatStructureForDate(structure: FormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>) =
410→            actualBuilder.add(structure)
411→
412→        override fun createEmpty(): Builder = Builder(AppendableFormatStructure())
413→    }
414→}
415→
416→internal interface AbstractWithDateBuilder : DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate {
417→    fun addFormatStructureForDate(structure: FormatStructure<DateFieldContainer>)
418→
419→    override fun year(padding: Padding) =
420→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(YearDirective(padding)))
421→
422→    override fun yearTwoDigits(baseYear: Int) =
423→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(ReducedYearDirective(baseYear)))
424→
425→    override fun monthNumber(padding: Padding) =
426→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(MonthDirective(padding)))
427→
428→    override fun monthName(names: MonthNames) =
429→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(MonthNameDirective(names)))
430→
431→    override fun dayOfMonth(padding: Padding) = addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(DayDirective(padding)))
432→    override fun dayOfWeek(names: DayOfWeekNames) =
433→        addFormatStructureForDate(BasicFormatStructure(DayOfWeekDirective(names)))
434→
435→    @Suppress("NO_ELSE_IN_WHEN")
436→    override fun date(format: DateTimeFormat<LocalDate>) = when (format) {
437→        is LocalDateFormat -> addFormatStructureForDate(format.actualFormat)
438→    }
439→}
440→
441→// these are constants so that the formats are not recreated every time they are used
442→internal val ISO_DATE by lazy {
443→    LocalDateFormat.build { year(); char('-'); monthNumber(); char('-'); dayOfMonth() }
444→}
445→internal val ISO_DATE_BASIC by lazy {
446→    LocalDateFormat.build { year(); monthNumber(); dayOfMonth() }
447→}
448→
449→private val emptyIncompleteLocalDate = IncompleteLocalDate()
450→

 81→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(years = 1), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1Y"))
 82→        assertEquals(DatePeriod(years = 1, months = 1), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1Y1M"))
 83→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(months = 11), DateTimePeriod.parse("P11M"))
 84→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(months = 10, days = 5), DateTimePeriod.parse("P10M5D"))
 85→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(years = 1, days = 40), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1Y40D"))
 86→
 87→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(months = 14), DateTimePeriod.parse("P14M"))
 88→        assertPeriodComponents(DateTimePeriod.parse("P14M") as DatePeriod, years = 1, months = 2)
 89→
 90→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(hours = 1), DateTimePeriod.parse("PT1H"))
 91→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(), DateTimePeriod.parse("P0D"))
 92→        assertEquals(DatePeriod(), DateTimePeriod.parse("P0D"))
 93→
 94→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(days = 1, hours = -1), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1DT-1H"))
 95→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(days = -1, hours = -1), DateTimePeriod.parse("-P1DT1H"))
 96→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(months = -1), DateTimePeriod.parse("-P1M"))
 97→
 98→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(years = -1, months = -2, days = -3, hours = -4, minutes = -5, seconds = 0, nanoseconds = 500_000_000),
 99→            DateTimePeriod.parse("P-1Y-2M-3DT-4H-5M0.500000000S"))
100→        assertPeriodComponents(DateTimePeriod.parse("P-1Y-2M-3DT-4H-5M0.500000000S"),
101→            years = -1, months = -2, days = -3, hours = -4, minutes = -4, seconds = -59, nanoseconds = -500_000_000)
102→
103→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(nanoseconds = 999_999_999_999_999L), DateTimePeriod.parse("PT277H46M39.999999999S"))
104→        assertPeriodComponents(DateTimePeriod.parse("PT277H46M39.999999999S"),
105→            hours = 277, minutes = 46, seconds = 39, nanoseconds = 999_999_999)
106→
107→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(nanoseconds = 999_999_999), DateTimePeriod.parse("PT0.999999999S"))
108→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(nanoseconds = -1), DateTimePeriod.parse("-PT0.000000001S"))
109→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(days = 1, nanoseconds = -1), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1DT-0.000000001S"))
110→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(nanoseconds = -999_999_999), DateTimePeriod.parse("-PT0.999999999S"))
111→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(days = 1, nanoseconds = -999_999_999), DateTimePeriod.parse("P1DT-0.999999999S"))
112→        assertPeriodComponents(DateTimePeriod.parse("P1DT-0.999999999S"), days = 1, nanoseconds = -999_999_999)
113→
114→        // overflow of `Int.MAX_VALUE` months
115→        assertFailsWith<IllegalArgumentException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P2000000000Y") }
116→        assertFailsWith<IllegalArgumentException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P1Y2147483640M") }
117→
118→        // too large a number in a field
119→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000Y") }
120→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000M") }
121→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000D") }
122→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000H") }
123→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000M") }
124→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P3000000000S") }
125→
126→        // wrong order of signifiers
127→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P1Y2D3M") }
128→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P0DT1M2H") }
129→
130→        // loss of precision in fractional seconds
131→        assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P0.000000000001S") }
132→
133→        // non-zero time components when parsing DatePeriod
134→        assertFailsWith<IllegalArgumentException> { DatePeriod.parse("P1DT1H") }
135→        DatePeriod.parse("P1DT0H")
136→    }

138→    @Test
139→    fun periodArithmetic() {
140→        val p1 = DateTimePeriod(years = 10)
141→        val p2 = DateTimePeriod(days = 3)
142→        val p3 = DateTimePeriod(hours = 2)
143→        val p4 = DateTimePeriod(hours = -2)
144→
145→        val dp1 = DatePeriod(years = 1, months = 6)
146→

148→        assertEquals(DatePeriod(years = 11, months = 6), dp1 + p1)
149→        assertEquals(DatePeriod(years = 2, months = 12), dp1 + dp1)
150→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(years = 1, months = 6, days = 3), p2 + dp1)
151→
152→        val dp2 = dp1 + p3 + p4
153→        assertEquals(dp1, dp2)

155→    }

157→    @Test
158→    fun durationConversion() {
159→        val periodZero = Duration.ZERO.toDateTimePeriod()
160→        assertEquals(DateTimePeriod(), periodZero)
161→        assertEquals(DatePeriod(), periodZero)
162→        assertTrue(periodZero is DatePeriod)
163→
164→        for ((period, duration) in listOf(
165→            DateTimePeriod(hours = 1) to 1.hours,
166→            DateTimePeriod(hours = 2) to 120.minutes,
167→            DateTimePeriod(minutes = 2, seconds = 30) to 150.seconds,
168→            DateTimePeriod(seconds = 2) to 2e9.nanoseconds
169→        )) {
170→            assertEquals(period, duration.toDateTimePeriod())
171→        }
172→    }
173→
174→    private fun assertPeriodComponents(period: DateTimePeriod,
175→                                       years: Int = 0, months: Int = 0, days: Int = 0,
176→                                       hours: Int = 0, minutes: Int = 0, seconds: Int = 0, nanoseconds: Int = 0) {
177→        assertEquals(years, period.years)
178→        assertEquals(months, period.months)
179→        assertEquals(days, period.days)
180→        assertEquals(hours, period.hours)
181→        assertEquals(minutes, period.minutes)
182→        assertEquals(seconds, period.seconds)
183→        assertEquals(nanoseconds, period.nanoseconds)
184→    }
185→}

 18→        public actual fun parse(

 25→

 27→        internal actual val MAX: LocalDate = LocalDate(jtLocalDate.MAX)
 28→
 29→        public actual fun fromEpochDays(epochDays: Int): LocalDate = try {
 30→            LocalDate(jsTry { jtLocalDate.ofEpochDay(epochDays) })
 31→        } catch (e: Throwable) {
 32→            if (e.isJodaDateTimeException()) throw IllegalArgumentException(e)
 33→            throw e
 34→        }

 36→        @Suppress("FunctionName")
 37→        public actual fun Format(block: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> =
 38→            LocalDateFormat.build(block)

 47→    public actual constructor(year: Int, monthNumber: Int, dayOfMonth: Int) :
 48→            this(try {
 49→                jsTry { jtLocalDate.of(year, monthNumber, dayOfMonth) }
 50→            } catch (e: Throwable) {
 51→                if (e.isJodaDateTimeException()) throw IllegalArgumentException(e)
 52→                throw e

 82→private fun LocalDate.plusNumber(value: Number, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDate =
 83→        try {
 84→            when (unit) {
 85→                is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> jsTry { this.value.plusDays((value.toDouble() * unit.days).toInt()) }
 86→                is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> jsTry { this.value.plusMonths((value.toDouble() * unit.months).toInt()) }

 98→                .run { if (days != 0) jsTry { plusDays(days) } else this }
 99→
100→    }.let(::LocalDate)
101→} catch (e: Throwable) {
102→    if (e.isJodaDateTimeException() || e.isJodaArithmeticException()) throw DateTimeArithmeticException(e)
103→    throw e

109→    var startD = this.value
110→    val endD = other.value
111→    val months = startD.until(endD, jtChronoUnit.MONTHS).toInt(); startD = jsTry { startD.plusMonths(months) }
112→    val days = startD.until(endD, jtChronoUnit.DAYS).toInt()
113→
114→    return DatePeriod(totalMonths = months, days)
115→}
116→
117→public actual fun LocalDate.until(other: LocalDate, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): Int = when(unit) {
118→    is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> monthsUntil(other) / unit.months
119→    is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> daysUntil(other) / unit.days
120→}
121→
122→public actual fun LocalDate.daysUntil(other: LocalDate): Int =
123→        this.value.until(other.value, jtChronoUnit.DAYS).toInt()
124→
125→public actual fun LocalDate.monthsUntil(other: LocalDate): Int =
126→        this.value.until(other.value, jtChronoUnit.MONTHS).toInt()
127→
128→public actual fun LocalDate.yearsUntil(other: LocalDate): Int =
129→        this.value.until(other.value, jtChronoUnit.YEARS).toInt()

  9→package kotlinx.datetime
 10→
 11→import kotlinx.datetime.format.*
 12→import kotlinx.datetime.internal.*
 13→import kotlinx.datetime.internal.safeAdd
 14→import kotlinx.datetime.internal.safeMultiply
 15→import kotlinx.datetime.serializers.LocalDateIso8601Serializer
 16→import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
 17→import kotlin.math.*
 18→
 19→internal const val YEAR_MIN = -999_999
 20→internal const val YEAR_MAX = 999_999
 21→
 22→private fun isValidYear(year: Int): Boolean =
 23→    year >= YEAR_MIN && year <= YEAR_MAX
 24→
 25→@Serializable(with = LocalDateIso8601Serializer::class)
 26→public actual class LocalDate actual constructor(public actual val year: Int, public actual val monthNumber: Int, public actual val dayOfMonth: Int) : Comparable<LocalDate> {
 27→
 28→    init {
 29→        // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#create
 30→        require(isValidYear(year)) { "Invalid date: the year is out of range" }
 31→        require(monthNumber in 1..12) { "Invalid date: month must be a number between 1 and 12, got $monthNumber" }
 32→        require(dayOfMonth in 1..31) { "Invalid date: day of month must be a number between 1 and 31, got $dayOfMonth" }
 33→        if (dayOfMonth > 28 && dayOfMonth > monthNumber.monthLength(isLeapYear(year))) {
 34→            if (dayOfMonth == 29) {
 35→                throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid date 'February 29' as '$year' is not a leap year")
 36→            } else {
 37→                throw IllegalArgumentException("Invalid date '${month.name} $dayOfMonth'")
 38→            }
 39→        }
 40→    }
 41→
 42→    public actual constructor(year: Int, month: Month, dayOfMonth: Int) : this(year, month.number, dayOfMonth)
 43→
 44→    public actual companion object {
 45→        public actual fun parse(input: CharSequence, format: DateTimeFormat<LocalDate>): LocalDate = format.parse(input)
 46→
 47→        @Deprecated("This overload is only kept for binary compatibility", level = DeprecationLevel.HIDDEN)
 48→        public fun parse(isoString: String): LocalDate = parse(input = isoString)
 49→
 50→        // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#toEpochDay
 51→        public actual fun fromEpochDays(epochDays: Int): LocalDate {
 52→            // LocalDate(-999999, 1, 1).toEpochDay(), LocalDate(999999, 12, 31).toEpochDay()
 53→            require(epochDays in MIN_EPOCH_DAY..MAX_EPOCH_DAY) {
 54→                "Invalid date: boundaries of LocalDate exceeded"
 55→            }
 56→            var zeroDay = epochDays + DAYS_0000_TO_1970
 57→            // find the march-based year
 58→            zeroDay -= 60 // adjust to 0000-03-01 so leap day is at end of four year cycle
 59→
 60→            var adjust = 0
 61→            if (zeroDay < 0) { // adjust negative years to positive for calculation
 62→                val adjustCycles = (zeroDay + 1) / DAYS_PER_CYCLE - 1
 63→                adjust = adjustCycles * 400
 64→                zeroDay += -adjustCycles * DAYS_PER_CYCLE
 65→            }
 66→            var yearEst = ((400 * zeroDay.toLong() + 591) / DAYS_PER_CYCLE).toInt()
 67→            var doyEst = zeroDay - (365 * yearEst + yearEst / 4 - yearEst / 100 + yearEst / 400)
 68→            if (doyEst < 0) { // fix estimate
 69→                yearEst--
 70→                doyEst = zeroDay - (365 * yearEst + yearEst / 4 - yearEst / 100 + yearEst / 400)
 71→            }
 72→            yearEst += adjust // reset any negative year
 73→
 74→            val marchDoy0 = doyEst
 75→
 76→            // convert march-based values back to january-based
 77→            val marchMonth0 = (marchDoy0 * 5 + 2) / 153
 78→            val month = (marchMonth0 + 2) % 12 + 1
 79→            val dom = marchDoy0 - (marchMonth0 * 306 + 5) / 10 + 1
 80→            yearEst += marchMonth0 / 10
 81→
 82→            return LocalDate(yearEst, month, dom)
 83→        }
 84→
 85→        internal actual val MIN = LocalDate(YEAR_MIN, 1, 1)
 86→        internal actual val MAX = LocalDate(YEAR_MAX, 12, 31)
 87→
 88→        internal const val MIN_EPOCH_DAY = -365961662
 89→        internal const val MAX_EPOCH_DAY = 364522971
 90→
 91→        @Suppress("FunctionName")
 92→        public actual fun Format(block: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDate.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> =
 93→            LocalDateFormat.build(block)
 94→    }
 95→
 96→    public actual object Formats {
 97→        public actual val ISO: DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> get() = ISO_DATE
 98→
 99→        public actual val ISO_BASIC: DateTimeFormat<LocalDate> = ISO_DATE_BASIC
100→    }
101→
102→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#toEpochDay
103→    public actual fun toEpochDays(): Int {
104→        val y = year
105→        val m = monthNumber
106→        var total = 0
107→        total += 365 * y
108→        if (y >= 0) {
109→            total += (y + 3) / 4 - (y + 99) / 100 + (y + 399) / 400
110→        } else {
111→            total -= y / -4 - y / -100 + y / -400
112→        }
113→        total += ((367 * m - 362) / 12)
114→        total += dayOfMonth - 1
115→        if (m > 2) {
116→            total--
117→            if (!isLeapYear(year)) {
118→                total--
119→            }
120→        }
121→        return total - DAYS_0000_TO_1970
122→    }
123→
124→    public actual val month: Month
125→        get() = Month(monthNumber)
126→
127→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#getDayOfWeek
128→    public actual val dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek
129→        get() {
130→            val dow0 = (toEpochDays() + 3).mod(7)
131→            return DayOfWeek(dow0 + 1)
132→        }
133→
134→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#getDayOfYear
135→    public actual val dayOfYear: Int
136→        get() = month.firstDayOfYear(isLeapYear(year)) + dayOfMonth - 1
137→
138→    // Several times faster than using `compareBy`
139→    actual override fun compareTo(other: LocalDate): Int {
140→        val y = year.compareTo(other.year)
141→        if (y != 0) {
142→            return y
143→        }
144→        val m = monthNumber.compareTo(other.monthNumber)
145→        if (m != 0) {
146→            return m
147→        }
148→        return dayOfMonth.compareTo(other.dayOfMonth)
149→    }
150→
151→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#resolvePreviousValid
152→    /**
153→     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the result exceeds the boundaries
154→     */
155→    private fun resolvePreviousValid(year: Int, month: Int, day: Int): LocalDate {
156→        val newDay = min(day, month.monthLength(isLeapYear(year)))
157→        return LocalDate(year, month, newDay)
158→    }
159→
160→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#plusMonths
161→    /**
162→     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the result exceeds the boundaries
163→     * @throws ArithmeticException if arithmetic overflow occurs
164→     */
165→    internal fun plusMonths(monthsToAdd: Int): LocalDate {
166→        if (monthsToAdd == 0) {
167→            return this
168→        }
169→        val monthCount = year * 12 + (monthNumber - 1)
170→        val calcMonths = safeAdd(monthCount, monthsToAdd)
171→        val newYear = calcMonths.floorDiv(12)
172→        val newMonth = calcMonths.mod(12) + 1
173→        return resolvePreviousValid(newYear, newMonth, dayOfMonth)
174→    }
175→
176→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#plusDays
177→    /**
178→     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the result exceeds the boundaries
179→     * @throws ArithmeticException if arithmetic overflow occurs
180→     */
181→    internal fun plusDays(daysToAdd: Int): LocalDate =
182→        if (daysToAdd == 0) this
183→        else fromEpochDays(safeAdd(toEpochDays(), daysToAdd))
184→
185→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
186→        this === other || (other is LocalDate && compareTo(other) == 0)
187→
188→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#hashCode
189→    override fun hashCode(): Int {
190→        val yearValue = year
191→        val monthValue: Int = monthNumber
192→        val dayValue: Int = dayOfMonth
193→        return yearValue and -0x800 xor (yearValue shl 11) + (monthValue shl 6) + dayValue
194→    }
195→
196→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#toString
197→    actual override fun toString(): String = format(Formats.ISO)
198→}
199→
200→@Deprecated("Use the plus overload with an explicit number of units", ReplaceWith("this.plus(1, unit)"))
201→public actual fun LocalDate.plus(unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDate =
202→        plus(1, unit)
203→
204→public actual fun LocalDate.plus(value: Int, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDate =
205→    try {
206→        when (unit) {
207→            is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> plusDays(safeMultiply(value, unit.days))
208→            is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> plusMonths(safeMultiply(value, unit.months))
209→        }
210→    } catch (e: ArithmeticException) {
211→        throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Arithmetic overflow when adding a value to a date", e)
212→    } catch (e: IllegalArgumentException) {
213→        throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Boundaries of LocalDate exceeded when adding a value", e)
214→    }
215→
216→public actual fun LocalDate.minus(value: Int, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDate = plus(-value, unit)
217→
218→public actual fun LocalDate.plus(value: Long, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDate =
219→        if (value > Int.MAX_VALUE || value < Int.MIN_VALUE)
220→            throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Can't add a Long to a LocalDate") // TODO: less specific message
221→        else plus(value.toInt(), unit)
222→
223→public actual operator fun LocalDate.plus(period: DatePeriod): LocalDate =
224→    with(period) {
225→        try {
226→            this@plus
227→                .run { if (totalMonths != 0) plusMonths(totalMonths) else this }
228→                .run { if (days != 0) plusDays(days) else this }
229→        } catch (e: ArithmeticException) {
230→            throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Arithmetic overflow when adding a period to a date", e)
231→        } catch (e: IllegalArgumentException) {
232→            throw DateTimeArithmeticException("Boundaries of LocalDate exceeded when adding a period", e)
233→        }
234→    }
235→
236→public actual fun LocalDate.until(other: LocalDate, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): Int = when(unit) {
237→    is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> monthsUntil(other) / unit.months
238→    is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> daysUntil(other) / unit.days
239→}
240→
241→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#daysUntil
242→public actual fun LocalDate.daysUntil(other: LocalDate): Int =
243→    other.toEpochDays() - this.toEpochDays()
244→
245→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#getProlepticMonth
246→internal val LocalDate.prolepticMonth get() = (year * 12) + (monthNumber - 1)
247→
248→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDate#monthsUntil
249→public actual fun LocalDate.monthsUntil(other: LocalDate): Int {
250→    val packed1 = prolepticMonth * 32 + dayOfMonth
251→    val packed2 = other.prolepticMonth * 32 + other.dayOfMonth
252→    return (packed2 - packed1) / 32
253→}
254→
255→public actual fun LocalDate.yearsUntil(other: LocalDate): Int =
256→    monthsUntil(other) / 12
257→
258→public actual fun LocalDate.periodUntil(other: LocalDate): DatePeriod {
259→    val months = monthsUntil(other)
260→    val days = plusMonths(months).daysUntil(other)
261→    return DatePeriod(totalMonths = months, days)
262→}
263→
264→internal fun LocalDate.previousOrSame(dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek) =
265→    minus((this.dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber - dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber).mod(7), DateTimeUnit.DAY)
266→
267→internal fun LocalDate.nextOrSame(dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek) =
268→    plus((dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber - this.dayOfWeek.isoDayNumber).mod(7), DateTimeUnit.DAY)

 16→@Serializable(with = LocalDateTimeIso8601Serializer::class)
 17→public actual class LocalDateTime
 18→public actual constructor(public actual val date: LocalDate, public actual val time: LocalTime) : Comparable<LocalDateTime> {
 19→    public actual companion object {
 20→        public actual fun parse(input: CharSequence, format: DateTimeFormat<LocalDateTime>): LocalDateTime =
 21→            format.parse(input)
 22→
 23→        @Deprecated("This overload is only kept for binary compatibility", level = DeprecationLevel.HIDDEN)
 24→        public fun parse(isoString: String): LocalDateTime = parse(input = isoString)
 25→

 27→        internal actual val MAX: LocalDateTime = LocalDateTime(LocalDate.MAX, LocalTime.MAX)
 28→
 29→        @Suppress("FunctionName")
 30→        public actual fun Format(builder: DateTimeFormatBuilder.WithDateTime.() -> Unit): DateTimeFormat<LocalDateTime> =
 31→            LocalDateTimeFormat.build(builder)
 32→    }
 33→
 34→    public actual object Formats {
 35→        public actual val ISO: DateTimeFormat<LocalDateTime> = ISO_DATETIME
 36→    }
 37→
 38→    public actual constructor(year: Int, monthNumber: Int, dayOfMonth: Int, hour: Int, minute: Int, second: Int, nanosecond: Int) :
 39→        this(LocalDate(year, monthNumber, dayOfMonth), LocalTime.of(hour, minute, second, nanosecond))
 40→
 41→    public actual constructor(year: Int, month: Month, dayOfMonth: Int, hour: Int, minute: Int, second: Int, nanosecond: Int) :
 42→        this(LocalDate(year, month, dayOfMonth), LocalTime.of(hour, minute, second, nanosecond))
 43→
 44→    public actual val year: Int get() = date.year
 45→    public actual val monthNumber: Int get() = date.monthNumber
 46→    public actual val month: Month get() = date.month
 47→    public actual val dayOfMonth: Int get() = date.dayOfMonth
 48→    public actual val dayOfWeek: DayOfWeek get() = date.dayOfWeek
 49→    public actual val dayOfYear: Int get() = date.dayOfYear
 50→    public actual val hour: Int get() = time.hour
 51→    public actual val minute: Int get() = time.minute
 52→    public actual val second: Int get() = time.second
 53→    public actual val nanosecond: Int get() = time.nanosecond
 54→
 55→    // Several times faster than using `compareBy`
 56→    actual override fun compareTo(other: LocalDateTime): Int {
 57→        val d = date.compareTo(other.date)
 58→        if (d != 0) {
 59→            return d
 60→        }
 61→        return time.compareTo(other.time)
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    override fun equals(other: Any?): Boolean =
 65→        this === other || (other is LocalDateTime && compareTo(other) == 0)
 66→
 67→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDateTime#hashCode
 68→    override fun hashCode(): Int {
 69→        return date.hashCode() xor time.hashCode()
 70→    }
 71→
 72→    // org.threeten.bp.LocalDateTime#toString
 73→    actual override fun toString(): String = format(ISO_DATETIME_OPTIONAL_SECONDS_TRAILING_ZEROS)
 74→
 75→    // org.threeten.bp.chrono.ChronoLocalDateTime#toEpochSecond
 76→    internal fun toEpochSecond(offset: UtcOffset): Long {
 77→        val epochDay = date.toEpochDays().toLong()
 78→        var secs: Long = epochDay * 86400 + time.toSecondOfDay()
 79→        secs -= offset.totalSeconds
 80→        return secs
 81→    }
 82→
 83→    /**
 84→     * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the result exceeds the boundaries
 85→     * @throws ArithmeticException if arithmetic overflow occurs
 86→     */
 87→    internal fun plus(value: Int, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): LocalDateTime =
 88→        LocalDateTime(date.plus(value, unit), time)
 89→}
 90→
 91→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDateTime#until
 92→internal fun LocalDateTime.until(other: LocalDateTime, unit: DateTimeUnit.DateBased): Int {
 93→    var endDate: LocalDate = other.date
 94→    if (endDate > date && other.time < time) {
 95→        endDate = endDate.plusDays(-1) // won't throw: endDate - date >= 1
 96→    } else if (endDate < date && other.time > time) {
 97→        endDate = endDate.plusDays(1) // won't throw: date - endDate >= 1
 98→    }
 99→    return when (unit) {
100→        is DateTimeUnit.MonthBased -> date.monthsUntil(endDate) / unit.months
101→        is DateTimeUnit.DayBased -> date.daysUntil(endDate) / unit.days
102→    }
103→}
104→
105→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDateTime#until
106→/** @throws ArithmeticException on arithmetic overflow. */
107→internal fun LocalDateTime.until(other: LocalDateTime, unit: DateTimeUnit.TimeBased): Long {
108→    val daysUntil = date.daysUntil(other.date)
109→    val timeUntil: Long = other.time.toNanosecondOfDay() - time.toNanosecondOfDay()
110→    return multiplyAddAndDivide(daysUntil.toLong(), NANOS_PER_DAY, timeUntil, unit.nanoseconds)
111→}
112→
113→// org.threeten.bp.LocalDateTime#plusWithOverflow
114→/**
115→ * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the result exceeds the boundaries
116→ * @throws ArithmeticException if arithmetic overflow occurs
117→ */
118→internal fun LocalDateTime.plusSeconds(seconds: Int): LocalDateTime
119→{
120→    if (seconds == 0) {
121→        return this
122→    }
123→    val currentNanoOfDay = time.toNanosecondOfDay() // at most a day
124→    val totalNanos: Long = seconds % SECONDS_PER_DAY * NANOS_PER_ONE.toLong() + // at most a day
125→        currentNanoOfDay
126→    val totalDays = seconds / SECONDS_PER_DAY + // max/24*60*60 < max * 0.000012
127→        totalNanos.floorDiv(NANOS_PER_DAY) // max 2 days
128→    val newNanoOfDay: Long = totalNanos.mod(NANOS_PER_DAY)
129→    val newTime: LocalTime = if (newNanoOfDay == currentNanoOfDay) time else LocalTime.ofNanoOfDay(newNanoOfDay)
130→    return LocalDateTime(date.plusDays(totalDays.toInt()), newTime)
131→}
132→
133→private val ISO_DATETIME_OPTIONAL_SECONDS_TRAILING_ZEROS by lazy {
134→    LocalDateTimeFormat.build {
135→        date(ISO_DATE)
136→        alternativeParsing({ char('t') }) { char('T') }
137→        time(ISO_TIME_OPTIONAL_SECONDS_TRAILING_ZEROS)
138→    }
139→}

[thinking: All the changes look correct. Let me now summarize what I've done:

## Summary of Changes

### Issue 1: `LocalDate.parse(s)` vs `LocalDate.Formats.ISO.parse(s)` inconsistency
**Problem**: Java's facil...]
All changes have been implemented successfully. Let me provide a summary of the fixes:

## Summary of Changes

### Issue 1: `LocalDate.parse(s)` vs `LocalDate.Formats.ISO.parse(s)` inconsistency

**Problem**: Java's facilities don't support having too many leading zeroes (like `+00000000000002022-07-16`), but our parsing mechanism does. When delegating to Java on JVM (or js-joda on JS), we couldn't parse strings with many leading zeros.

**Fix**: Modified the following files to always use our own format parser instead of delegating to platform parsers:
- `core/jvm/src/LocalDate.kt` - Now uses `format.parse(input)` directly
- `core/jvm/src/LocalDateTime.kt` - Now uses `format.parse(input)` directly
- `core/commonJs/src/LocalDate.kt` - Now uses `format.parse(input)` directly
- `core/commonJs/src/LocalDateTime.kt` - Now uses `format.parse(input)` directly

Also removed unused `DateTimeParseException` imports from JVM files.

### Issue 2: `DatePeriod.parse` and `DateTimePeriod.parse` parsing "P"

**Problem**: It is inconsistent with ISO 8601 to parse just `P` without any components, but the parser was accepting it.

**Fix**: Modified `core/common/src/DateTimePeriod.kt` to add validation that rejects period strings with no components:
```kotlin
if (state == AFTER_P)
    parseException("Unexpected end of input; at least one component is required after 'P'", i)
```

### Tests Added

1. **DateTimePeriodTest.kt**: Added tests to ensure "P", "+P", and "-P" are rejected as invalid:
   ```kotlin
   assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("P") }
   assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("+P") }
   assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DateTimePeriod.parse("-P") }
   assertFailsWith<DateTimeFormatException> { DatePeriod.parse("P") }
   ```

2. **LocalDateTest.kt**: Added test for parsing dates with many leading zeroes:
   ```kotlin
   checkComponents(LocalDate.parse("+00000002022-07-16"), 2022, 7, 16)
   assertEquals(LocalDate.parse("+00000002022-07-16"), LocalDate.Formats.ISO.parse("+00000002022-07-16"))
   ```

3. **LocalDateTimeTest.kt**: Added test for parsing date-times with many leading zeroes:
   ```kotlin
   checkComponents(LocalDateTime.parse("+00000002022-07-16T18:43:15"), 2022, 7, 16, 18, 43, 15)
   assertEquals(LocalDateTime.parse("+00000002022-07-16T18:43:15"), LocalDateTime.Formats.ISO.parse("+00000002022-07-16T18:43:15"))
   ```
